inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: User age in years for basal metabolic rate calculation.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: Biological gender (0 for female, 1 for male) to determine BMR formula.

inputs.label: Activity Level Factor
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity factor (e.g., 1.2 sedentary, 1.375 light, 1.55 moderate, 1.725 active, 1.9 athlete).

inputs.label: Fasting Day Calorie Limit
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total daily energy expenditure allowed on fasting days, typically 25%.

formulas.BMR: (gender === 1) ? (10 * weight + 6.25 * height - 5 * age + 5) : (10 * weight + 6.25 * height - 5 * age - 161)
